meta.title: Tadris AI – Teacher's AI Companion
meta.description: Save 10+ Hours a Week on Teaching Tasks. The Future of Academic Productivity.

hero.badge: The AI Co-Pilot Built for Saudi Higher Education
hero.subtitle: Upload your course material. Get quizzes, slide decks, lesson plans, lab exercises, NCAAA reports, and more — reviewed and approved by you, always.

mockup.q1Question: Which data structure follows Last In, First Out (LIFO) ordering?
mockup.q2Question: Compare the time complexity of Bubble Sort and Merge Sort. When would you choose one over the other?

problem.title: The Administrative Burden is Real
problem.subtitle: Academic excellence is often buried under hours of manual documentation and routine grading. Reclaim your time for what matters most: your students.
problem.scenario1Text: It's Sunday night. You have 80 essays to grade by morning.
problem.scenario2Text: The semester ended two weeks ago. You're still writing the NCAAA report.
problem.scenario3Text: Your students submitted last week. You still haven't had time to respond.
problem.vaultText: You recorded a great lecture last week. It's sitting in a folder, doing nothing.

howItWorks.title: A Simple 3-Step Workflow
howItWorks.subtitle: Tadris AI fits seamlessly into your teaching routine. No complex training, no reformatting—just results.
howItWorks.step1Text: Upload your existing course material. PDF, Word, PowerPoint, or just paste text. No reformatting needed.
howItWorks.step2Text: Select your output — quiz, slides, lesson plan, NCAAA report, lab exercise, grading, and more.
howItWorks.step3Text: The AI generates a draft. You review it, edit anything you want, and use it.
howItWorks.trustMarker: Nothing goes anywhere without your approval.

features.title: Outcomes Over Features.
features.subtitle: Interact with our core workflows to see how we transform the academic burden into teaching momentum.

lecture.description: Get a study guide, flashcards, a quiz, and a mind map — ready to share with students.

exams.outcome: Build a full exam from your course material
exams.description: Every question mapped to your CLOs, across every format you need — automatically.

grading.outcome: Grade 80 essays in 2 hours instead of 20
grading.description: The AI drafts the feedback; you review and send. Reclaim your weekends with automated rubric mapping.

assistant.description: Students get answers at any hour. You see what they're struggling with in your dashboard.

planner.outcome: Type your topic and learning objective
planner.description: Get a complete lesson plan in seconds, built on what actually works for similar courses.

slides.outcome: Turn any document into a presentation
slides.description: Choose your tone, set your language, add speaker notes — done in seconds.

collaborative.outcome: See what top instructors are doing
collaborative.description: Observe best practices in your subject area and adapt proven strategies for your own class.

labs.outcome: Create a fully structured lab exercise
labs.description: Problem statements, instructions, hints, solution guides, and rubrics — in minutes.

pedagogy.outcome: Not sure how to teach a complex topic?
pedagogy.description: Get evidence-based delivery suggestions based on how similar instructors approached it.

ncaaa.description: Upload your grades and get a complete accreditation report draft — including the action plan.

differentiators.title: Why Choose Tadris AI?
differentiators.subtitle: Unlike generic AI tools, Tadris is purpose-built for the strict ethical, privacy, and accreditation standards of Saudi higher education.
differentiators.teacherControlText: The AI drafts, but the Professor confirms. No autonomous grades are ever finalized without manual override.
differentiators.transparentOutputsText: Every AI-generated statement is cited back to your course materials or provided student submissions.
differentiators.groundedText: Tadris only generates content based on what you have uploaded. It will not invent facts, add unsourced claims, or go off-script from your course content.
differentiators.dataPrivacyText: Enterprise-grade encryption. Student data is never used to train global models. GDPR and NCAAA aligned.
differentiators.customizableText: Every AI generation is fully editable. Refine feedback, adjust rubric weights, and tailor lesson plans before they go live.

impact.title: What Changes When You Use Tadris
impact.subtitle: Essay Grading
impact.old1: Reading 80 student essays one by one
impact.old2: Writing individual feedback from scratch for each student
impact.old3: No visibility into what the whole class struggled with
impact.new1: AI drafts rubric-aligned feedback for every student
impact.new2: You review, adjust anything you want, approve and send
impact.new3: Dashboard shows exactly which topics the whole class struggled with

benefits.title: Elevate Your Academic Impact
benefits.subtitle: Tadris AI handles the administrative heavy lifting, so you can focus on the core of teaching: thinking, mentoring, and inspiring.
benefits.b1Title: 6-7 Hours of Admin. Every Week. Gone
benefits.b1Text: That's the average time Saudi faculty lose to admin tasks Tadris handles. Time you get back for research, mentoring, and actually teaching.
benefits.b2Text: The AI drafts rubric-aligned feedback for every student. You review, adjust if needed, and send. Your students hear back before the next class.
benefits.b3Text: Stop switching between Excel, Word, your LMS, and your notes just to write one NCAAA report. Tadris pulls everything together in one place.

comparison.title: How We Compare
comparison.subtitle: See how Tadris AI stacks up against the tools you may already know.
comparison.f2: Arabic language outputs with I’rab accuracy
